file.template:
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: "{{ kube_server }}"
    {% if kube_ca %}certificate-authority-data: "{{ kube_ca }}"{% endif %}
    {% if kube_insecure_skip_tls_verify is defined %}insecure-skip-tls-verify: {{ kube_insecure_skip_tls_verify }}{% endif %}
  name: dynamic-cluster
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: dynamic-cluster
    user: dynamic-user
  name: dynamic-context
current-context: dynamic-context
kind: Config
preferences: {}
users:
- name: dynamic-user
  user:
    token: "{{ kube_token }}"
